sharingan.name: Sharingan
sharingan.description: 30% chance to evade an attack and counter with a copy of it.

byakugan.name: Byakugan
byakugan.description: Attacks never miss, ignore evasion and substitution. Reveals enemy HP/CP.

jinchuriki.name: Jinchuriki
jinchuriki.description: Below 30% HP: STR/NIN surge to +2 and regenerates 10% HP per turn.

medical_ninja.name: Medical Ninja
medical_ninja.description: Healing jutsu x1.5. Revives a fallen ally once per battle (50 CP).

sensor.name: Sensor
sensor.description: Reveals all enemy units and affinities on switch-in.

substitution_master.name: Substitution Master
substitution_master.description: The first hit that would KO leaves 1 HP (once per battle).

sand_shield.name: Sand Shield
sand_shield.description: Automatic sand defense: physical damage taken x0.7.

mist_veil.name: Mist Veil
mist_veil.description: Hidden Mist conditioning: special damage taken x0.85.

chakra_control.name: Chakra Control
chakra_control.description: Perfect control: all jutsu cost 5 less CP (min 1).

shadow_artisan.name: Shadow Artisan
shadow_artisan.description: Yin techniques cost 5 less CP and gain +10 accuracy.

beast_mimicry.name: Beast Mimicry
beast_mimicry.description: Multi-hit techniques roll one extra hit.

puppet_master.name: Puppet Master
puppet_master.description: Tools never break and deal +20% damage.

iron_wall.name: Iron Wall
iron_wall.description: Cannot have DEF or RES lowered by enemies.

legendary_sannin.name: Legendary Sannin
legendary_sannin.description: Immune to Fear and Seal. +10% to all stats in boss battles.
